text.title: Server Init Bootstrap Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Server Init Bootstrap end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: access-users
step.input: VPS IP + root credential + operator pubkey
step.action: Create operator user, install pubkey to ~/.ssh/authorized_keys.
step.decision-gate: Open a second terminal, SSH as operator. If this fails, abort — do not edit sshd.

step.name: packages-tools
step.action: apt update + install (curl, jq, vim, htop, etc.).

step.name: security-hardening
step.action: Drop-in sshd config, enable ufw with default deny incoming, enable fail2ban with sshd jail.
